endpoint_schema.title: Persons List
endpoint_schema.description: Returns an array of person (contact) objects from the Pipedrive CRM. Each person represents a contact with associated email addresses, phone numbers, and organization links.

company_id.description: ID of the company this person belongs to

active_flag.description: Whether the person is active (not deleted)

email.description: Array of email address objects associated with the person

label.description: Label for the email (e.g., work, home)

primary.description: Whether this is the primary email address

phone.description: Array of phone number objects associated with the person

label.description: Label for the phone number (e.g., work, mobile, home)

primary.description: Whether this is the primary phone number

org_id.description: Organization linked to the person (expanded object with org details)

people_count.description: Number of people in the organization

cc_email.description: The CC email address assigned by Pipedrive for linking email conversations to this organization

owner_id.description: User who owns the person record (expanded object)

has_pic.description: Whether the owner has a profile picture (0 or 1)

pic_hash.description: Hash of the owner profile picture

active_flag.description: Whether the owner user is active

open_deals_count.description: Number of open deals associated with the person

related_open_deals_count.description: Number of open deals related through organization

closed_deals_count.description: Number of closed deals associated with the person

related_closed_deals_count.description: Number of closed deals related through organization

participant_open_deals_count.description: Number of open deals where the person is a participant

participant_closed_deals_count.description: Number of closed deals where the person is a participant

email_messages_count.description: Number of email messages linked to the person

activities_count.description: Number of activities linked to the person

files_count.description: Number of files linked to the person

notes_count.description: Number of notes linked to the person

followers_count.description: Number of followers of the person

won_deals_count.description: Number of won deals associated with the person

related_won_deals_count.description: Number of won deals related through organization

lost_deals_count.description: Number of lost deals associated with the person

related_lost_deals_count.description: Number of lost deals related through organization

last_incoming_mail_time.description: Timestamp of the last incoming email

last_outgoing_mail_time.description: Timestamp of the last outgoing email

label.description: ID of the label assigned to the person

add_time.description: Time when the picture was added

update_time.description: Time when the picture was last updated

pictures.description: URLs of the picture in various sizes

next_activity_date.description: Date of the next scheduled activity

next_activity_time.description: Time of the next scheduled activity

next_activity_id.description: ID of the next scheduled activity

last_activity_id.description: ID of the last completed activity

last_activity_date.description: Date of the last completed activity

visible_to.description: Visibility setting of the person (1=owner only, 3=owner's visibility group, 5=owner's visibility group and sub-groups, 7=entire company)

add_time.description: Timestamp when the person was created

update_time.description: Timestamp when the person was last updated

delete_time.description: Timestamp when the person was deleted

cc_email.description: The CC email address assigned by Pipedrive for linking email conversations to this person

org_name.description: Name of the organization linked to the person

owner_name.description: Name of the user who owns the person record

user_id.description: Filter persons by the owner user ID. When supplied, only persons owned by the given user are returned.

filter_id.description: Filter persons using a predefined Pipedrive filter by its ID.

first_char.description: Filter persons whose name starts with the specified letter or character.

sort.description: Field name and sort direction to order results (e.g., 'update_time DESC').
